name: .env Injector Agent
purpose: Injects secrets/config into a local run (creates/updates .env or binds runtime env vars) without leaking values into logs.

name: Local CLI Runner
purpose: Runs packaged agents locally via a minimal CLI agent runtime with logs + exit codes.

name: Local Filesystem Agent
purpose: Reads/writes local files for tasks like indexing, renaming, templating, and report generation.

name: Secret Redaction Agent
purpose: Scans outputs/logs and redacts secrets/PII using rules + patterns before saving receipts.

name: Form Autofill Agent
purpose: Autofills forms from a schema + user-provided data in a controlled, preview-first workflow.

name: Playwright Browser Runner
purpose: Executes scripted browser flows against demo targets and returns screenshots + step receipts.

name: Recorder Replay Agent
purpose: Replays recorded UI steps (click/type/wait/assert) with deterministic timing + selectors.

name: UI Regression Test Agent
purpose: Runs baseline UI checks (DOM assertions + screenshot diffs) to detect breakages and generate a report.

name: Hardware-backed Approval Agent
purpose: Gates high-risk actions behind a hardware-backed user approval and records proof.

name: Local Password Vault Agent
purpose: Stores/retrieves credentials locally using encryption; provides time-limited secret handles to agents.

name: Local Signing Agent
purpose: Signs payloads (agent packages, receipts, approvals) with a locally held keypair.

name: Offline Receipts Agent
purpose: Captures a complete what-happened run log offline (inputs, actions, artifacts) for later review/export.

name: App Launcher Agent
purpose: Generates a launcher.html linking to discovered app index.html entry points.

name: Audit Agent
purpose: General structural audit for a local web/app repo: counts, missing local asset refs, and a clean JSON report.

name: Code Tester Agent
purpose: Runs lightweight JS checks (node --check) or grep-based sanity scans and produces a failure report.

name: Data Link Agent
purpose: Checks cross-link integrity in HTML (relative href/src) and reports broken local links.

name: Fixer Agent
purpose: Runs a controlled set of safe autofixes (meta cleanup, optional nexus bar injection, 404 stub creation).

name: Meta Cleaner Agent
purpose: Scans HTML/Markdown for placeholder meta/text and can apply safe replacement rules.

name: Nexus Bar Agent
purpose: Checks for a Nexus bar marker across HTML pages and can inject a minimal Back-to-Nexus bar when missing.

name: Page Builder Agent
purpose: Creates missing stubs (404.html, README.md) per app root and logs what it generated.

name: Playwright Smoke Test Agent
purpose: Runs a basic Playwright smoke flow against controlled demo targets and saves screenshot receipts.

name: Portfolio Checker Agent
purpose: Validates app folders against required files (index.html, etc.) and reports missing components.

name: Route Optimizer Agent
purpose: Builds a reachable-page graph from an entry HTML, flags missing targets and orphan pages.

name: Settings Sync Agent
purpose: Finds settings.json files and reports drift; can sync all copies to a chosen source.

name: Thumbnail Sync Agent
purpose: Finds app roots and verifies required thumbnail/hero assets; can optionally copy a template thumb to fill gaps.

name: Tile Sorter Agent
purpose: Sorts a tiles/modules JSON file by a chosen key and optionally applies the change in-place.

name: ZIP Verifier Agent
purpose: Validates ZIP integrity and lists entries (bounded) into a receipts-friendly report.

name: API Load Tester Agent
purpose: Performs a stress test on a target URL by firing concurrent requests and measuring average latency and success rates.

name: Disk Cleanup Agent
purpose: Scans a target directory and deletes files older than a specified number of days. Essential for log rotation or temp file hygiene.

name: Docker Manager Agent
purpose: Interacts with the Docker daemon to list running containers or restart a specific container.

name: Fuzz Stress Agent (The "Chaos Monkey")
purpose: Generates random, potentially dangerous inputs to test the robustness of a CLI command or API. It loops until it triggers a crash or timeout.

name: Git Operations Agent
purpose: Automate source control tasks. This agent can clone repositories, check status, or commit changes automatically (e.g., after a "Secret Redaction" run).

name: Port Killer Agent (DevOps Utility)
purpose: Finds the process ID (PID) listening on a specific TCP port and terminates it. Extremely useful when a previous server instance hangs and blocks a port.

name: Process Monitor Agent (System Control)
purpose: Lists the top consuming processes by CPU or Memory usage. A lightweight "top" or "Task Manager" alternative.

name: Release Orchestrator Agent (The "Manager")
purpose: This agent doesn't just "do" a task; it manages a sequence of other tasks. It simulates a CI/CD pipeline by running Git checks, Tests, and Archival in order.

name: System Health Monitor
purpose: Captures a snapshot of the machine's vital signs (CPU, RAM, Uptime). Useful for creating a "Baseline Run" before executing heavy load tests.

name: Zip Archiver Agent
purpose: Compresses a target directory into a .zip file. Useful for backups or preparing artifacts for deployment.

name: Code Formatter Agent (Dev Utility)
purpose: formats source code (.js, .json, .css, .md) using prettier. Ensures consistent style across your project files.

name: Contract Filler (Legal Automation)
purpose: Takes a text template (e.g., NDA) with placeholders like {{NAME}} and fills them with provided data. Safe, local document generation.

name: Cron Scheduler Agent
purpose: Registers a task in a local JSON schedule registry. This avoids cross-platform issues with system crontab. A hypothetical "Runner" would read this file.

name: CSV Processor Agent (Data Logic)
purpose: Reads a raw CSV file, parses it, filters rows based on criteria, and exports the result as JSON. Real data transformation logic.

name: Excel Cleaner (Data Hygiene)
purpose: Reads an Excel file, removes duplicate rows, trims whitespace from cells, and saves a "Clean" version.

name: In-Memory SQL Engine (Database)
purpose: A tiny SQL parser that runs queries like SELECT name FROM users WHERE age > 20 directly against a JSON array. Shows how database filtering logic works.

name: Invoice Generator Agent (Finance)
purpose: Generates a professional PDF invoice with line items, totals, and tax calculations using pdfkit.

name: JSON Validator Agent (DevTools)
purpose: Validates a JSON file against basic syntax rules or a provided schema. Finds syntax errors (trailing commas, missing quotes) instantly.

name: License Compliance Agent (Legal)
purpose: Scans a project's node_modules folder (or package.json) to list all software licenses used. Flags "Copyleft" licenses (GPL) that might be risky for proprietary code.

name: Log Analyzer Agent (Analytics Logic)
purpose: Parses raw server logs (Apache/Nginx style), aggregates traffic statistics, and identifies error spikes. Uses regex capture groups and statistical sorting.

name: Markdown Table Generator (Productivity)
purpose: Converts a JSON array or CSV-like string into a perfectly formatted Markdown table. Useful for generating reports or documentation.

name: Markdown to HTML Agent (Content Logic)
purpose: Converts Markdown documentation into static HTML. Includes a simple regex-based parser (no heavy deps) to show logic implementation.

name: PDF Extractor Agent (Document Intelligence)
purpose: Reads a PDF file and extracts raw text content. Essential for indexing documents, analyzing invoices, or scraping academic papers.

name: Slide Deck Builder (Presentation)
purpose: Generates a .pptx PowerPoint presentation from a simple JSON structure. Great for automating monthly status reports.

name: SQLite Query Agent
purpose: Executes SQL queries against a local database file (.db). Great for data seeding, verification, or ad-hoc reporting.

name: Text Adventure Engine (Interactive Fiction)
purpose: Loads a JSON "world" definition (rooms, items, exits) and lets the user navigate it via command line. A mini-engine for Interactive Fiction.

name: Text Diff Engine (Algorithms)
purpose: Compares two text files and outputs the line-by-line differences (Git style) using the diff algorithm. Shows exactly what changed.

name: Tree Visualizer Agent (File Utility)
purpose: Generates a text-based tree structure of a directory. Useful for documenting project structure or debugging file placement.

name: ASCII Art Agent (Visual)
purpose: Converts standard text into large ASCII art banners using figlet. Great for CLI tool headers or adding flair to logs.

name: Audio Transcriber Agent (Hearing)
purpose: Converts audio files (mp3, wav) into text using the OpenAI Whisper API. Essential for processing voice notes or meeting recordings.

name: Barcode Generator Agent (Utility)
purpose: Generates retail-standard barcodes (Code 128, EAN, UPC) as PNG images. Useful for inventory tracking or printing labels.

name: Binaural Beat Generator (Audio Synthesis)
purpose: Generates a .wav file with a specific frequency in the Left ear and a slightly different one in the Right ear. The brain perceives the difference (the "beat"). Used for focus (Gamma), relaxation (Alpha), or sleep (Delta).

name: Chart Generator Agent (Data Viz)
purpose: Turns raw numbers (JSON) into a professional PNG bar or line chart using chart.js. Perfect for automated reporting.

name: Colorblindness Simulator (Accessibility)
purpose: Processes an image and simulates how it looks to someone with Protanopia (Red-Blind), Deuteranopia (Green-Blind), or Tritanopia (Blue-Blind). Essential for checking UI contrast.

name: Fractal Generator (Chaos Theory)
purpose: Renders the Mandelbrot Set (or Julia Set) to a high-resolution PNG image. Demonstrates complex number iteration.

name: Image Processor Agent (Media)
purpose: Resizes, converts, or grayscales images using jimp (JavaScript Image Manipulation Program). A lightweight alternative to sharp that doesn't require native compilation.

name: Matrix Rain Agent (Visuals)
purpose: Turns your terminal into the "Matrix" digital rain code. Purely aesthetic, but a classic computing staple.

name: Meme Generator Agent (Visuals)
purpose: Takes an image and overlays "Top Text" and "Bottom Text" using the Impact font (classic meme style). Uses jimp for pure JS image editing.

name: Morse Code Audio Agent (Tactical)
purpose: Converts a text string into a standard WAV audio file of Morse Code beeps (dots and dashes).

name: OCR Agent (Computer Vision)
purpose: Reads text from an image (scanned doc, screenshot, sign) using Tesseract.js. It turns pixels into copy-pasteable strings.

name: Pixel Art Upscaler (Graphics)
purpose: Resizes small pixel art images (e.g., 16x16) to large sizes (e.g., 512x512) using "Nearest Neighbor" interpolation to preserve sharp edges (no blur).

name: QR Code Generator Agent (Media)
purpose: Generates a QR Code image (PNG) for any given text or URL. Useful for sharing links to mobile devices.

name: Site Mirror Agent (Archivist)
purpose: Downloads a complete static copy of a website (HTML, CSS, Images) to a local folder. Like wget but in JS. Great for backups or offline viewing.

name: Sprite Slicer Agent (Game Dev)
purpose: Takes a single "Sprite Sheet" image (grid of characters) and slices it into individual image files based on a fixed grid size (e.g., 32x32).

name: Text-to-Speech Agent (Speaking)
purpose: Converts text into a high-quality MP3 audio file using the OpenAI TTS API. Useful for creating announcements, podcast intros, or accessibility features.

name: Video-to-GIF Agent (Media)
purpose: Converts a video file (MP4/MOV) into an animated GIF. It uses ffmpeg to optimize the palette for high quality.

name: Wallpaper Swapper (Redecorator)
purpose: Instantly changes the desktop background to a specified image. Can be used for branding, alerts, or pranks.

name: Watermark Agent (Media)
purpose: Applies a semi-transparent text watermark to an image. Perfect for copyright protection or branding social media content.

name: YouTube Downloader Agent (The "I Need This" Tool)
purpose: Downloads videos or extracts audio from YouTube URLs using ytdl-core. No ads, no sketchy sites.

name: Calendar Invite Agent (Scheduling)
purpose: Generates a standard .ics file for calendar events. Compatible with Outlook, Google Calendar, and Apple Calendar.

name: Desktop Notifier Agent (OS Integration)
purpose: Triggers a native system notification (Toast on Windows, Banner on Mac, Notification on Linux). Great for "Job Complete" alerts.

name: Discord Webhook Agent (Social)
purpose: Sends a "Rich Embed" (fancy formatted message with colors, fields, and footers) to a Discord channel via Webhook URL. Great for system alerts or status reports.

name: Identicon Generator (Procedural Art)
purpose: Generates a unique, geometric avatar (Identicon) based on a text string (like an email or username). Consistent input always produces the same unique image.

name: Mouse Jiggler Agent (The "AFK Cheat")
purpose: programmatically moves your mouse cursor 1 pixel every minute. Keeps your computer awake and your Teams/Slack status "Green" (Active) while you nap.

name: Resume Parser Agent (HR Tech)
purpose: Reads a resume (PDF/Text) and attempts to extract structured contact info (Email, Phone) and Keywords (Skills).

name: RSS Monitor Agent (Content Ingestion)
purpose: Fetches an RSS feed URL, parses the XML, and extracts the latest headlines. Useful for tracking blogs, system status pages, or news.

name: Slack Bot Agent (Communication)
purpose: Sends a formatted message to a Slack channel via Incoming Webhook (just like the Discord agent, but for Slack's specific JSON structure).

name: SMTP Sender Agent (Communication)
purpose: Sends an email using an SMTP server (e.g., Gmail, Outlook, or local Mailhog). Useful for alerting, reporting, or testing transactional emails.

name: Clipboard Manager Agent (Productivity)
purpose: Reads the current clipboard content or writes new content to it. Useful for chaining agents (e.g., "Summarize text" -> "Copy to clipboard").

name: Crypto Wallet Agent (Web3)
purpose: Generates a fresh, cryptographically secure Ethereum wallet (Public Address + Private Key) using ethers.js. Can be used for cold storage or dev testing.

name: LLM Client Agent (The "Brain")
purpose: Connects to a local AI server (like Ollama) or OpenAI to generate text. It attempts to be "smart" by detecting if the local AI is offline and failing gracefully.

name: MIDI Composer Agent (Music)
purpose: Generates a random, melodic musical sequence and saves it as a standard .mid file. You can drag this file into GarageBand or Ableton to hear it.

name: Sentiment Analyzer Agent (Emotional Intelligence)
purpose: Uses a local dictionary-based approach (AFINN-165) to score the emotional tone of text. Runs entirely offline with zero latency.

name: Broken Link Crawler (QA / Web)
purpose: Spiders a starting URL, extracts all hyperlinks (<a href="...">), and sends HTTP HEAD/GET requests to verify they are accessible (Status 200). Detects dead links ("link rot").

name: HTML Scraper Agent (Lightweight Web)
purpose: Uses cheerio (jQuery for server-side) to scrape static HTML pages. Faster and more lightweight than Playwright for sites that don't need JavaScript execution.

name: Reddit Scraper (Social)
purpose: Pulls the top posts from a specific subreddit (title, score, link) and saves them as a structured JSON report. Great for trend monitoring.

name: Audio Spectrogram Agent (Signal Processing)
purpose: Analyzes an audio file and generates a visual heatmap (Spectrogram) of frequencies over time. Essential for audio engineering and forensics.

name: Blockchain Miner Agent (Crypto)
purpose: Demonstrates the core mechanism of Bitcoin (Proof-of-Work). It tries millions of random "nonces" until it finds a SHA256 hash that starts with a specific number of zeros (difficulty).

name: DNS Digger Agent (Network Intel)
purpose: Performs a deep dive into a domain's DNS records, retrieving A, AAAA, MX, TXT, and NS records. Useful for debugging email issues or verification tokens.

name: Exif Metadata Spy (Forensics)
purpose: Extracts hidden metadata from images (GPS coordinates, Camera Model, Shutter Speed, Date Taken). Useful for verifying the origin of an image.

name: File Date Spoofer (Forensics)
purpose: Modifies the "Created", "Modified", and "Accessed" timestamps of a file to any date in the past or future. Used to hide when a file was actually touched.

name: File Encryptor Agent (Security)
purpose: Encrypts (and Decrypts) any file using AES-256-CTR. Protects sensitive documents before sharing or storage.

name: File Integrity Monitor (Compliance)
purpose: Calculates SHA-256 hashes of all files in a directory and compares them to a "known good" baseline to detect unauthorized changes (e.g., malware or tampering).

name: JWT Token Generator (Auth Utility)
purpose: Creates valid, cryptographically signed JSON Web Tokens (JWTs) using HMAC SHA256. Useful for testing APIs that require authentication headers without needing a full login flow.

name: Network Port Scanner
purpose: Security / Diagnostic tool. It scans a target host (localhost or IP) for open ports to ensure services are running (or to find unauthorized listeners).

name: Password Auditor (Security)
purpose: Analyzes a password string for strength, calculates entropy, and estimates the time it would take to crack it via brute force.

name: Ransomware Canary (Defense)
purpose: Creates a hidden "honey pot" file and watches it. If any process modifies or deletes this file (typical ransomware behavior), it triggers an alert.

name: Secure File Shredder (Privacy)
purpose: Permanently destroys a file by overwriting it with 0s, 1s, and random bytes before deleting. Makes forensic recovery nearly impossible.

name: SEO Auditor Agent (Marketing)
purpose: Crawls a URL and checks for critical SEO tags (Title, Description, H1, Alt Tags) and performance indicators. Generates a "Scorecard."

name: SSL Certificate Checker (Network Security)
purpose: Connects to a domain via TLS, retrieves the certificate chain, and calculates days until expiration. Essential for uptime monitoring.

name: Subdomain Enumerator (Recon)
purpose: Uses a dictionary attack to find active subdomains (e.g., admin.site.com, mail.site.com) by resolving them against DNS.

name: Token Counter Agent (Cost Estimator)
purpose: Calculates the number of tokens in a string using gpt-3-encoder. Essential for estimating LLM costs and ensuring prompts fit within context windows.

name: TOTP Authenticator (Security)
purpose: Generates Time-based One-Time Passwords (like Google Authenticator) for a given 2FA secret. Useful for automating logins that require 2FA.

name: Whois Agent (Network Intel)
purpose: Queries WHOIS servers to find domain registration details (Registrar, Creation Date, Expiry). Useful for domain research.

name: A Pathfinder (AI)**
purpose: Finds the shortest path between two points in a grid with obstacles using the A* (A-Star) algorithm. Visualizes the path in ASCII.

name: ARP Network Scanner (Recon)
purpose: Scans the local network cache to identify connected devices (IP and MAC addresses). Useful for finding "who is on my WiFi."

name: Astronomy Agent (Space)
purpose: Calculates the current phase of the moon and the position of the sun. Can determine sunrise/sunset times for a given latitude/longitude.

name: Brainfuck Interpreter (Esoteric)
purpose: Runs code written in Brainfuck, a famous minimalistic language that uses only 8 characters (> < + - . , [ ]). Requires manipulating a memory tape byte-by-byte.

name: Currency Converter Agent (Finance)
purpose: Fetches real-time exchange rates (USD base) from a public API and performs conversions.

name: Dice Roller Agent (Randomness)
purpose: Simulates rolling dice (d6, d20, etc.) using cryptographic randomness. Useful for games or decision making.

name: Disk Space Analyzer (System)
purpose: Scans a directory recursively to calculate total size and identify largest files. Helpful for cleaning up clutter.

name: DNA Translator Agent (Bio-informatics)
purpose: Translates a raw DNA sequence (e.g., "GATTACA") into its complementary strand, RNA equivalent, and Protein (Amino Acid) sequence.

name: Fake Update Agent (Prank)
purpose: Instantly launches a full-screen browser window displaying a realistic "Windows Update" or "macOS Update" animation. Locks the user's attention (until they press F11/Esc).

name: Ghost Typer Agent (Haunted)
purpose: Waits a few seconds, then takes control of the keyboard to type a message character by character. Looks exactly like someone has remote control of the PC.

name: Honeyport Agent (Trap)
purpose: Opens a fake server on a common port (e.g., 8080 or 21). If anyone tries to connect to it (like a network scanner or hacker), it logs their IP and disconnects them.

name: Hue Light Controller (IoT)
purpose: Controls Philips Hue smart lights (or compatible Zigbee bridges). Can toggle power, change brightness, and set RGB colors remotely.

name: Instagram Avatar Grabber (OSINT)
purpose: Fetches the high-resolution profile picture URL for a public Instagram user without needing an API key (using public scraping).

name: Invisible Folder Agent (Magic Vanish)
purpose: Toggles the "Hidden" attribute of a folder. On Windows, this makes it disappear from Explorer (unless "Show Hidden" is on). On Mac/Linux, it renames it with a . prefix.

name: Language Detector Agent (Linguistic ID)
purpose: Analyzes a text sample and determines the probability of it being English, Spanish, French, etc. Useful for routing support tickets or selecting translation models.

name: Linear Regression Agent (Data Science)
purpose: Takes a set of X,Y data points, calculates the "Line of Best Fit" (y = mx + b), and predicts future values. The foundation of Machine Learning.

name: Local Server Agent (Instant Hosting)
purpose: Instantly spins up a static HTTP server for a specific directory. Useful for previewing HTML builds or sharing files on the LAN.

name: Loot Box Simulator (Gacha Logic)
purpose: Simulates opening "Loot Boxes" based on a weighted probability table. Useful for game balancing or demonstrating RNG (Random Number Generation) mechanics.

name: Markov Chain Agent (Text Gen)
purpose: Ingests a text source, builds a probabilistic model of word transitions (Markov Chain), and generates new "nonsense" text that mimics the style of the original.

name: Minecraft Server Pinger (Gaming)
purpose: Queries a Minecraft Server (Java Edition) for its status, MOTD (Message of the Day), version, and current player count.

name: Mini-Compiler Agent (Language Design)
purpose: A tiny interpreter for a custom language called "ToyScript." It supports variables, printing, and basic math. Shows how code is actually parsed and executed.

name: MQTT Broker Agent (IoT Hub)
purpose: Connects to an MQTT broker (like Mosquitto) to publish messages or subscribe to a topic for a few seconds. Essential for debugging IoT sensor networks.

name: Neural Net Trainer (Machine Learning)
purpose: Trains a simple Perceptron (Single-Layer Neural Network) from scratch to solve logic gates (like OR/AND) without using any ML libraries.

name: Physics Engine Agent (Simulation)
purpose: Simulates simple 2D physics (gravity, bouncing balls) and outputs the frame data. Useful for understanding kinematics or creating animations.

name: Prime Number Checker (Math)
purpose: Determines if a number is prime and, if not, finds its factors. A classic computational task.

name: Quote of the Day Agent (Inspiration)
purpose: Fetches an inspiring quote from a public API. Simple, but great for dashboard "motd" (Message of the Day) widgets.

name: Rhyme Finder Agent (Linguistics)
purpose: Finds perfect rhymes, near rhymes, and alliteration for a given word using the Datamuse API. Useful for poetry or songwriting.

name: Speedtest Agent (The "Dashboard" Tool)
purpose: Connects to Ookla's Speedtest.net servers to measure Ping, Download, and Upload speeds.

name: Subliminal Message Flasher (Psych Tech)
purpose: Uses a transparent, always-on-top Electron window to flash a text message on the user's screen for 10ms every few seconds. Imperceptible but present.

name: Sudoku Solver Agent (Logic)
purpose: Solves any Sudoku puzzle instantly using a recursive backtracking algorithm. Useful for demonstrating constraint satisfaction.

name: System Spec Agent (Hardware Info)
purpose: Pulls detailed hardware specifications including CPU brand, Cores, RAM speed, Battery level, and OS build. Uses the powerful systeminformation library.

name: Torrent Downloader Agent (P2P)
purpose: Downloads files via the BitTorrent protocol using webtorrent. Supports magnet links.

name: Unit Converter Agent (Utility)
purpose: A robust conversion engine for Length, Weight, Temperature, and Volume.

name: URL Shortener Agent (Utility)
purpose: Uses a public API (TinyURL) to shorten a long URL.

name: USB Watchdog (Hardware)
purpose: Monitors the system for new USB devices plugged in or removed. Uses OS polling to avoid native dependency compilation issues.

name: vCard Generator (Networking)
purpose: Generates a standard .vcf file for importing contacts into Outlook, iOS, or Android.

name: Wake-on-LAN Agent (IoT Magic)
purpose: Sends a "Magic Packet" over the network to a specific MAC address. If the target PC has Wake-on-LAN enabled in BIOS, it will physically turn on.

name: Weather Agent (Real-time Info)
purpose: Fetches current weather data for a city using the Open-Meteo API (Free, no key required).

name: Zip Bomb Generator (The "Trap")
purpose: Creates a "Recursive Zip Bomb" — a tiny file (kilobytes) that expands into massive size (Gigabytes/Petabytes) if extracted.

name: Bluetooth Radar Agent (Surveillance)
purpose: Scans the physical area for Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) devices (Phones, Fitbits, Headphones). Shows you what hardware is nearby.

name: Burn-After-Reading Agent (Spy Tech)
purpose: Spins up a temporary web server that hosts a secret message. Once the message is viewed one time, the server immediately shuts down and deletes the evidence.

name: Clipboard Logger (Surveillance)
purpose: Monitors the clipboard in the background. Whenever the content changes (user copies text), it logs the content to a file with a timestamp.

name: IP Geolocation Tracker (Surveillance)
purpose: Traces an IP address to a physical location (City, Country, ISP, Lat/Long) using the ip-api.com service.

name: Keystroke Logger Agent (Surveillance)
purpose: Hooks into the OS input stream and records every key pressed to a local log file.

name: Polyglot File Generator (Hacker Tech)
purpose: Creates a "Polyglot" file—a single file that is a valid JPG image and a valid ZIP archive at the same time. You can view it as a picture, or unzip it to reveal hidden files.

name: Stealth Browser Agent (Evasion)
purpose: A Playwright script configured to evade basic bot detection. It modifies navigator properties and randomization to look like a real human user.

name: Steganography Agent (Spy Tech)
purpose: Hides a secret text message inside the pixels of a PNG image. The image looks normal to the naked eye, but the message can be recovered by this agent later.

name: Webcam Spy Agent (Hardware)
purpose: Silently activates the connected webcam, takes a snapshot, and saves it. No preview window, no flash (usually).

name: WiFi Jammer Simulator (Network Attack)
purpose: Simulates a Deauthentication attack logic (sending termination packets) without actually transmitting radio signals (safe mode). Used to demonstrate how simple these scripts are.

name: WiFi Password Revealer (The "Magic Trick")
purpose: Uses OS commands (netsh on Windows, security on Mac) to retrieve the saved password for a known WiFi network.
